name_en: Top-tier original stock [Exclusive real shot M48865 White flower charm / Small] This Capucines BB handbag is crafted from grained Taurillon calfskin, enhanced by lustrous metal hardware and a removable Monogram floral leather charm. 27 x 17 x 14 cm (Length x Height x Width)
